reforms.description: The Norwegian government has set an objective to increase R&D spending to match the OECD average by 2005, which would require a significant increase in current R&D spending levels.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Increasing R&D spending is expected to enhance innovation and productivity.
reforms.status_evidence: The objective was set by the government but has not yet been implemented.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant policy change aimed at increasing national R&D investment.
reforms.source_quote: Recognising the importance of R&D in the economy’s growth performance, the government has formulated an objective of reaching the average OECD spending share on R&D by 2005.

reforms.description: The Quality Reform of Higher Education introduced increased autonomy for educational institutions, linking funding to performance in teaching and research, and established a new degree structure to facilitate international comparisons.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Enhancing the quality of higher education is expected to improve the skills of the workforce, thereby supporting innovation.
reforms.status_evidence: The reform has been put into practice and is currently in effect.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform significantly alters the governance and funding structure of higher education in Norway.
reforms.source_quote: The Quality Reform gives education institutions increased autonomy concerning management and organisation of their activities.

reforms.description: The establishment of a National Centre for Contact with the Business Community aims to enhance recruitment of students in technical subjects by fostering connections between educational institutions and the business sector.
reforms.component_name: National Centre for Contact with the Business Community
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Improving connections between education and industry is expected to enhance the skills of graduates and support innovation.
reforms.status_evidence: The centre has been established and is operational.
reforms.importance_rationale: While significant, this reform is more focused and does not represent a systemic change.
reforms.source_quote: A National Centre for Contact with the Business Community on mathematical, science and technology subjects (RENATE) has been introduced.
